description: Jury100 — Nasscom self-evaluation suite. 100 office/technology tickets: Microsoft, HSBC Tech, JPMorgan Tech, Capgemini (25 each). Clear titles and descriptions. Security tickets prefixed 'Security incident:'.

cases.title: Teams meeting lobby bypass failure
cases.description: Microsoft Redmond campus: Microsoft Teams external guest stuck in lobby for executive briefing. Lobby policy change blocked auto-admit for trusted partners. Business impact on client delivery timeline. Need IT support triage and resolution.

cases.title: SharePoint site collection restore pending
cases.description: Microsoft Redmond campus: SharePoint Online site collection accidentally deleted. Admin center shows restore window expiring in 4 hours. Business impact on client delivery timeline. Need IT support triage and resolution.

cases.title: Azure DevOps pipeline YAML validation error
cases.description: Microsoft Redmond campus: Azure DevOps release pipeline fails YAML schema validation after template library upgrade. Production deployment blocked. Business impact on client delivery timeline. Need IT support triage and resolution.

cases.title: Power BI dataset refresh gateway offline
cases.description: Microsoft Redmond campus: On-premises data gateway for Power BI finance dataset offline. Scheduled refresh failed three consecutive runs. Business impact on client delivery timeline. Need IT support triage and resolution.

cases.title: Dynamics 365 sales entity sync failure
cases.description: Microsoft Redmond campus: Dynamics 365 opportunity sync to Dataverse failing with plugin exception. EMEA forecast commit at risk. Business impact on client delivery timeline. Need IT support triage and resolution.

cases.title: SQL Azure elastic pool DTU exhaustion
cases.description: Microsoft Redmond campus: Azure SQL elastic pool DTU pegged at 100 percent. CRM microservice timeouts during business hours. Business impact on client delivery timeline. Need IT support triage and resolution.

cases.title: Cosmos DB request rate throttling alert
